economic_notes: Tsiskaristiere/Dundee Land Claim Settlement of $239,808,436 received April 2020 (prior year event); funds invested in GICs and restricted per settlement agreement. Senior facility and chronic care facility with combined capacity of 80 beds. CMHC Section 95 housing mortgage program active.
notes: Fiscal year 2021 (year ended March 31, 2021). The large one-time Tsiskaristiere/Dundee Land Claim Settlement of $235,536,152 net was recorded in fiscal year 2020 (prior year), not 2021. In 2021, the $236,855,786 net proceeds were received in cash (April 2020) and invested in GICs restricted per settlement agreement - this inflated temporary investments to $332M. Nation straddles Ontario/Quebec border (Akwesasne territory). ISC funding figure shown is amount due from ISC per note 3, not total ISC transfers. Total government transfers of $107,301,456 per statement of operations. Consolidated subsidiary: Akwesasne Corp. GBEs (modified equity): Akwesasne Harbour Development Corporation and Cornwall-Akwesasne Harbour Partnership. Infrastructure & Housing expenses of $9,583,817 included under expenses_housing. Pension expense $2,490,529. Police services expenses $8,572,386; Justice $1,288,457; Economic development $1,404,295; Executive services $7,938,786; Mohawk government $2,385,802 not mapped to standard categories.
